contextMenuSendCurrentPageToSidepanel.message: Send current page URL to side panel - Please open the side panel to view

contextMenuSendLinkToSidepanel.message: Send link content to side panel - Please open the side panel to view

contextMenuSendToIncognito.message: Send selected text to incognito window

contextMenuSendToSidepanel.message: Send selected text to side panel - Please open the side panel to view

currentUrlLoaded.message: Current page URL has been loaded

extDescription.message: Send web page text or link content to the side panel, edit it, and open it in a new tab or incognito tab.

fileAccessWarning.message: To allow this extension to access local files, enable 'Allow access to file URLs' in chrome://extensions for this extension.

incognitoDisabledHint.message: Extension is already running in incognito mode

incognitoWarning.message: To ensure it opens in an existing incognito window, enable 'Allow in incognito' in chrome://extensions for this extension.

SendContentToSidepanel.message: Send selected content to side panel

SendCurrentPageToSidepanel.message: Send current page URL to side panel

settingsEnableContextMenuDesc.message: Show context menu items to send selected text, links, or page URLs to the side panel or incognito window

settingsRetainTextDesc.message: Show buttons to save and load text content in the side panel
